title: T-013 — ScanInput component (auto-focus, hardware/camera/manual) (06-a)
prompt:
# T-013 — ScanInput primitive

PRD: docs/prd/06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-FE-006, §6 D5, §9.1 scan-first input pattern
UX: prototypes/design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md §9.1
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver the shared `<ScanInput onScan={(value, method) => ...} />` primitive that every operational screen embeds — autofocus, inputMode='none' default, Enter terminator, blue-500 border + 3px focus ring, 300ms debounce auto-advance, clear-after-scan.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/components/scan-input.tsx`:
   - Props: `{ onScan, hint?, big?: boolean, disabled?, allowManual?: boolean }`.
   - Auto-focus on mount and on remount; restore focus when window regains focus.
   - Hardware mode default (inputMode='none'); a 'Wpisz ręcznie' link toggles manual which sets inputMode='text'.
   - 'Skanuj aparatem' button delegates to CameraScanner (T-014) via render prop slot.
   - Detects scan method via T-004 detect util, classifies last 6 keystrokes timing, passes 'hardware'|'manual' to onScan; camera path passes 'camera'.
2. RTL tests + Playwright keystroke burst test.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/components/scan-input.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scan-input.test.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scan-input.e2e.spec.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production component renders, when compared to the prototype scan input pattern at `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-receive.jsx:89-233` (po_item_screen scan area), then it has the same blue-500 border, autofocus behavior, hint text below, 'Wpisz ręcznie' fallback link and 'Skanuj aparatem' camera button — verified by RTL snapshot + manual checklist in pipeline_inputs.details
2. Given a 6-character keystroke burst <50ms apart ending in Enter, when fired into ScanInput, then onScan is invoked once with method='hardware' and the input clears
3. Given the user clicks 'Wpisz ręcznie' and types '6 chars + Enter' slowly (>200ms between keys), when Enter fires, then onScan is invoked once with method='manual'

## Test strategy
- RED: write scan-input.test.tsx + scan-input.e2e.spec.ts asserting hardware burst, manual fallback, prototype parity before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scan-input && pnpm --filter scanner test:e2e scan-input'

## Risk red lines
- Do not let onScan fire twice for a single Enter
- Do not lose focus when the window blurs and refocuses
- Do not emit onScan with empty value

pipeline_inputs.description: Shared ScanInput primitive with autofocus, hardware/camera/manual parity, debounce, clear-after-scan.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist (must verify in RTL + manual review):
1) Same blue-500 border + 3px alpha-20 focus ring as prototype scan input area.
2) hint text rendered below input.
3) 'Wpisz ręcznie' link toggles inputMode and emits manual method.
4) 'Skanuj aparatem' button slot for CameraScanner (T-014).
5) Auto-focus on mount; restore focus on window focus event.
6) onScan never fires with empty value or twice per Enter.
out_of_scope: Do not wire ScanInput into specific screens here
Do not add audio feedback inside ScanInput (subscriber pattern via T-005 FeedbackBus)
Do not implement P2 flows here: transfer-order (TO) creation, replenishment, cycle-count, inquiry full traceability — P1 stubs only
Do not implement offline queue write-path here (P2); P1 keeps offline-safe scan buffer + indicator only
acceptance_criteria: Given the production component renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-receive.jsx:89-233, then it has the same blue-500 border, autofocus, hint text, manual fallback link and camera button — verified by RTL snapshot + manual checklist
Given a 6-char keystroke burst <50ms apart ending in Enter, when fired into ScanInput, then onScan is invoked once with method='hardware' and input clears

Given the user toggles to manual and types '6 chars + Enter' slowly (>200ms between keys), when Enter fires, then onScan is invoked once with method='manual'. Follow parity evidence requirements in `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
test_strategy: RED: write scan-input.test.tsx + e2e spec asserting parity + hardware burst + manual fallback before implementation
Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scan-input && pnpm --filter scanner test:e2e scan-input'
For UI parity, capture 390x844 screenshots and Playwright trace/video artifacts; attach artifact paths in closeout per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`.
risk_red_lines: Do not fire onScan twice per Enter
Do not lose focus on window refocus
Do not emit onScan with empty value
Do not bypass scanner.* permission namespace when wiring server actions
Do not regress operator-friendly touch targets (>=48dp) or mobile viewport 390x844 evidence
cross_module_dependencies: 02-settings: PIN policy, locale, scanner device defaults
